{{Quote|I'll bet I catch more trout than ever today!|Wicket Wystri Warrick|<ref name="Wicket Goes Fishing: An Ewok Adventure">''[[Wicket Goes Fishing: An Ewok Adventure]]''</ref>}}
'''Trout''' were a kind of [[Fish/Legends|fish]] on the [[Endor/Legends|forest moon of Endor]]. The native [[Ewok/Legends|Ewoks]] would sometimes go [[Fishing/Legends|fishing]] to catch trout to eat. A [[Fur-bearing trout|fur-bearing]] variety existed on [[Paulking XIV]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Lando Calrissian and the Mindharp of Sharu]]'' {{1stm}}
*{{GalaxiesAED}} {{1st}}
*''[[Wicket Goes Fishing: An Ewok Adventure]]'' {{Mo}}
